## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Flosum to discuss content strategy, analytics, and next steps for SEO and content marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New reporting dashboard ready with additional tabs and cohort filtering capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Focus shifting towards middle/bottom of funnel content, including category, alternatives, and versus pages](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Flosum working on updating competitive messaging; GrowthX to wait on this before creating alternatives content](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
  - [Strategic platform messaging project kicking off to create enterprise motion for Flosum](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)

## Topics

### Analytics Dashboard Update

  - [New dashboard with additional tabs and cohort filtering](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Includes overview, non-branded, conversions, cohorts, landing pages, query, and LLM referral traffic tabs](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Ability to filter by GrowthX-created content vs. non-GrowthX URLs](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Some updates still needed (e.g., non-GrowthX filter for conversions tab)](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)

### Content Performance and Strategy

  - [60+ articles produced across various clusters (compliance, data management, protection, platform optimization)](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [Even distribution of content and traffic across clusters](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [Gap identified in middle/bottom of funnel content (category, alternatives, versus pages)](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Recommendation to focus on creating more MOFU/BOFU content in coming months](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Potential for long-tail keywords with higher actual traffic than estimated](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)

### Competitive Messaging and Alternatives Content

  - [Flosum updating competitive messaging for 3 primary competitors](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
  - [GrowthX to wait on creating alternatives content until Flosum's competitive set is updated](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
  - [Flosum aiming to update competitive pages by end of next week](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Product marketing board to be shared with GrowthX team for additional insights](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Backup and Archive Product Update

  - [New trial offer with charity donation incentive](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
  - [Positive feedback from potential enterprise clients (NASDAQ, Associated Bank)](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Shifting focus towards platform pain points and enterprise motion](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)

### Strategic Platform Messaging Project

  - [Kickoff meeting scheduled for tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)
  - [Aim to create messaging for Flosum as a platform, not just individual product sets](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=1815.0)
  - [Focus on enterprise motion and platform pain points (DevOps, backup/archive, data migration)](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)

## Next Steps

  - Matt to review and expand on keyword list provided by Jakub
  - Flosum to share product marketing board with GrowthX team (Jakub, Jessalynn, Rachel)
  - Beau to send lead-to-opportunity conversion report to Jakub
  - Continue with planned keywords for next week
  - Schedule deeper dive into new content strategy later in August
  - [Flosum to update competitive messaging and pages](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [GrowthX to wait on creating alternatives content until competitive messaging is updated](https://fathom.video/share/Xcgec_-Var4TsU-BAvbewRQReJPkf8JH?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
